long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngas03.sr07.wdc04 Et6/3/1 <-> ngcs091.2.sr07.wdc04 Et18/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19688
short_description: ngas03.sr07.wdc04 Et6/3/1 <-> ngcs091.2.sr07.wdc04 Et18/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
